authors: Hannes Cools Claes H. de Vreese ASCoR
raw_title: From Automation to Transformation with AI-Tools: Exploring the Professional Norms and the Perceptions of Responsible AI in a News Organization
title_en: From Automation to Transformation with AI-Tools: Exploring the Professional Norms and the Perceptions of Responsible AI in a News Organization
title_zh: 从自动化到转型：探索新闻机构中的人工智能工具专业规范与负责任人工智能认知
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了新闻机构如何从简单的自动化转向更深入的转型，使用人工智能工具。它关注记者和编辑如何看待负责任地使用人工智能，以及这如何影响他们的工作方式和专业标准。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how news organizations move from basic automation to deeper transformation using AI tools. It focuses on how journalists and editors perceive responsible AI use and how this affects their work practices and professional standards.
research_direction_zh: 研究新闻业中人工智能技术的采纳、伦理影响以及专业实践的变化，特别是在数字化转型背景下如何平衡创新与责任。
research_direction_en: Investigating the adoption of AI technologies in journalism, ethical implications, and changes in professional practices, particularly how innovation and responsibility are balanced in digital transformation contexts.
